MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Philip Kilduff, Esq., specially appeared for Plaintiff & Moving party Investment Retrievers, Inc.
Michael Martzke, Judgment Debtor, appeared in Propria Persona

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED and MODIFIED: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $150 per pay period.
